prompt.text: Sortiere: Ist das eine Erlaubnis oder ein Verbot?

members: I'm allowed to go out.
She's allowed to stay up late.
We're allowed to wear earrings.
They're allowed to have a party.
I'm not allowed to go out.
She isn't allowed to stay up late.
We aren't allowed to wear earrings.
They aren't allowed to have a party.

items.hintDe: Mit not (isn't, aren't, 'm not) ist es ein Verbot, ohne not eine Erlaubnis.
items.explainDe: be allowed to (ohne not) ist eine Erlaubnis, be not allowed to (mit not) ist ein Verbot.
items.note: gs permission-vs-ban; members use bank verbs go/stay/wear/have + earrings(g3-u09)/party(bank)

prompt.text: Sortiere: Ist der Satz richtig oder falsch gebaut?

members: She is allowed to go out.

She are allowed to go out.
We don't allowed to run.
You allowed to stay up?
I'm not allowed to eating sweets.

items.explainDe: Falsch sind: She are (statt is), don't allowed (statt aren't), fehlendes be, und eating statt eat nach to.
items.note: gs correct-vs-wrong-form; covers all 3 error types; grant: go/run/stay/eat (bank), sweets (g3-u09)

is allowed to go out.
are allowed to go out.

items.note: matching subject<->be-form, English<->English, unique rights; grant: go (core)

prompt.text: Welche Frage passt zu welcher Antwort?

pairs.left: Am I allowed to use your phone?

items.note: matching question<->answer, English<->English, unique rights; grant: get (bank), tattoo (get a tattoo g3-u09), stay (bank), play/use (bank), park (bank)
